title: Loopy Powers
description: A mod that adds several unique superpowers to players via Minecraft progression
body:
## Overview
Loopy Powers is a mod that adds 18 unique superpowers to the game that players can get through survival progression.

Each power comes with a passive, primary ability, secondary ability and ultimate that are all unlocked through levels, altering how you play through survival Minecraft.

The current powers implemented are:
Speed, Fire, Teleportation, Lightning, Flight, Blood, Sound, Strength, Explosion, Nature, Ice, Fortune, Darkness, Healing Factor, Psychic, Cosmic, Telekinesis and Interdimensional

## Wiki
You can access the wiki [here](https://github.com/floopydoopyyy/LoopyPowers/wiki).
This should detail everything there is to this mod.

But due to crafting trees and specific requirements I recommend a utility mod like Just Enough Items to be used alongside this mod.

## Feedback
Bugs, ideas and feedback can be reported through my [GitHub](https://github.com/floopydoopyyy/LoopyPowers/discussions)!

Currently this mod only supports English.

## Requirements
Only requirement is Fabric 0.92.7 or higher. (If a Fabric version is being used)
Available on: 1.19.4 1.20.1, 1.20.4 1.21.1

## Final Notes
This is my first mod, so expect there to be a few issues that need ironing out - I'm happy to address critisicm on my [GitHub](https://github.com/floopydoopyyy/LoopyPowers/discussions)!
There will definetly also be some issues with ability balancing, this is something I aim to maintain and adjust.
